messages.message: I noticed your army in Trieste could use support. If you move to VEN or PIE this spring, I’d be happy to back your position from the south. Let me know your plans.
I’m keen to avoid conflict with your forces. If you’re moving into TUS or ION, I’d appreciate a heads-up so we can coordinate our movements.
I’m looking to strengthen my southern front. If your fleet nears APU or ION, I’d appreciate knowing in advance so we can avoid clashes.

Hi France,
I'm sending a message just to say hi. I'm happy to keep burgundy as a DMZ between us. I also think we should be on the lookout to prevent a strong England in the early game.

I’ve been watching your movements near the Tyrol, and I suspect your ambitions may extend toward the Italian border. If you’re considering moves into TYR or PIE, I’d appreciate a heads-up so we can manage our forces efficiently.
That seems fair enough! Are you more looking to focus on Austria or France? Either way, we could coordinate!
Hey Germany! I'm 100% down to DMZ Burgundy and would love to work with you against England!

Hi Italy,

No I'm not planning on moving to Tyrolia, I'd like us to keep that a DMZ.

Hey France!
I know that France and England can have a contentious relationship but I think that with a little care and effort we can make it work to our mutual benefit.

Hi Italy!
I reckon R-I is one of the strongest alliances on the map, especially if we can work together quickly on the other two players. Would you be down for that?
I will gladly help you in any way I can if you help me by telling me if England or Germany send you any negative press. It'd be great if we could both profit from this game.
Awesome, I look forward to working with you :)
Your fleet’s position near the Black Sea has me curious—will you be moving toward the Mediterranean this spring? I’d hate for any unexpected encounters to arise.
Hey England! I would love to work with you! I'm sure you're opening to Norwegian Sea, North Sea, and Edinburg. Would you like to DMZ the English Channel?

Hi Turkey!
A little note to open the game to establish some trust between us, I think a cooperation against Austria could be a good start. Would you be open to that?
And what are your thoughts on Belgium?
That’s good to hear. I’d be happy to support keeping Tyrolia neutral—I think it benefits us both. If you’re not moving toward PIE or TYR, I’ll proceed cautiously along my southern front.
What are your thoughts on Belgium?
Hi Russia, I'm just messaging to make sure we don't bounce in sweden
Hey Russia! I hope you're opening North, I'd love to ally against England with you. Germany seems on board with it as well.

Hey Austria!

I know we don't have a lot of things to discuss, but I hope we can share information that is relevant to the other.

I'm pretty sure Russia is opening North, at least, that's what he's told me. It would be great if you could talk to him about that, maybe you could open to Galicia?
Sure! I'm not planning on opening against you, would you agree to DMZ Prussia and Silesia?
I think we could leave it empty for now, and if you have the capacity in the spring to take it, I will support you

An alliance between Russia and Italy sounds mutually beneficial. I’m in the early stages of my strategy and would appreciate understanding your goals this season. If you’re looking to move toward the Balkans or Mediterranean, I’d be happy to coordinate.
Hey Turkey! How do you do?
Hi France! I haven't made up my mind yet but you're making a good argument. I have some diplomacy to do to make sure that's what I'll do.
I look forward to working with you
DMZ English Channel sounds good to me. We will talk more about Belgium after we see how people open.
Sounds good.
Yes, I can agree to that. Also if you get an opportunity to bounce England in Norway I'd appreciate it
That's fair, let me know what you decide.
Any news from Turkey?

Hi Germany!
I hope that we can avoid any conflict this game. Are you interested in some cooperation?
Hello France! I'm quite well at the moment, and yourself?

I think I'm moving to Burgundy, I don't want to make it obvious that we're allied yet. Just in case England goes to English Channel, I don't want to give up the initiative on Belgium. But of course, I still want to work with you and not him.
Thoughts?

Hey France,

Thank you for the info. I'll certainly see what I can do. I'd be interested to know if Germany is going to be able to bounce Russia out of Swe, too.
Absolutely, what did you have in mind?
I'm doing pretty good, thanks for asking! It would be great if we could share relevant information about Russia, Austria, Italy, etc.

Italy,

Yeah, that sounds good. In return, I'd be happy to offer you support into Greece in the fall.
France seems to be wanting to get 3 builds in the first year. That may be a concern for both of us
That would be good, you should talk to him about it.

Hey Germany,

I was wondering if you could promise Russia Sweden and then keep him from getting it. I can offer to move to Galicia in exchange. I'd appreciate that a lot and I'm happy to be more than a little useful later on in the game.

Hi Russia,

Are you interested in an alliance? I think we could make quick work of Turkey and then I could turn towards Italy while you go after Scandinavia.
Or perhaps even Germany? I'm sure we could come to some sort of agreement
Hi Austria, I'm not going to promise it to Russia, but if he threatens either of us then I will help keep him out.

I don't see how your worried about England if you're planning on moving to burgundy. You would bounce if he moved there and if you don't bounce then you move to Burgundy. If you don't want to move to burgundy then I'd prefer you move to Picardy.
Okay, will do.
That seems like a good plan!
Alright, thanks a lot.

Hi Austria! Sounds good, I was actually hoping you'd suggest something like that. Would you agree to DMZ Galicia?
Would you be open to support me into Rumania?
Alright, I can move to Picardy, if you would prefer that.

Hi Turkey,

Have you given any thought to how you would like to deal with Russia?
I would much prefer that yes
How about a bounce in Black Sea to start with?
I haven't fully decided what to do yet. Austria has suggested that he could support me into Rumania and go after Turkey, which seems plausible.
I have a strong feeling that we can take down Turkey quickly if we work together.
Only that we'll bounce in Black Sea in the spring. I'd be open to that.
Hi England! I don't think it's in my best interest to start a fight in Scandinavia, so I'm hoping that you'll take Norway with a fleet, and not convoy an army. Does that work for you?
That's fair
That seems reasonable
Ok, done!
Honestly, I'm waiting to see how they react to this turn. Do you have any ideas?
That works for me. I would like to get my army on the continent somewhere where it can do some damage if at all possible.
That’s a fair proposition—I’m always keen to strengthen alliances. I’ll keep an eye on England and Germany’s messaging and pass along any relevant intel to you.
How about we both agree to keep armies out of Scandinavia? I can leave Sweden to you later, and in exchange you'll let me have Norway once you take your next center.

That sounds like a promising offer—support into Greece in the fall would be very helpful to me. I appreciate your willingness to cooperate. If you're moving toward VEN or PIE this spring, I’d still be happy to support your position from the south.

An agreement with Germany may be interesting, but I’d be wary of entangling alliances too early. For now, I’d appreciate clarity on your own plans for the Mediterranean—ION or APU would be key areas of mutual interest.

An Austrian push into Romania sounds like it could create opportunities elsewhere. If you're considering movement toward the Balkans or Mediterranean, I’d be interested in coordinating so we avoid overlapping ambitions. I’m also monitoring Austria’s support offer to me—perhaps a triangular arrangement could emerge.
Are you going to be in a position to contest Belgium or do you have a DMZ with France?
That sounds good to me. I would like to work together in the future but we can discuss that later.
So far I'm planning on taking Rumania for myself. If I move to Galicia I'll probably piss off Austria, and it'll be hard for me to get him to support me into Rumania.
Sounds good!
No I don't. He told me he's going to move there and that's why I brought it up with you.
He asked me about Belgium too. I think it would be best for both of us if we can keep him out.
Yes, I'm all for keeping him out. He's trying to convince me to give him Belgium, which is really not a good deal for me
If we have a solid alliance, then I'll support you to Belgium
We'll discuss Belgium later after we see how everyone opens.

I understand your interest in Rumania—it’s a key region for expansion. If Austria becomes a problem, I’d be open to coordinating in the Balkans or Mediterranean to ensure your path remains unobstructed. Let me know if you’d be open to discussing a mutual strategy against Austria.
Sounds good
Germany has reached out to me and he seems friendly enough. Do you know anything about him?
Any news on England's plans?
Yeah, France has requested I don't move on Venice so I won't be.
I'm not sure, but I'm concerned about Russia. He's already asking for Galicia and has asked me to support him into Rumania in the fall.
Yeah, a DMZ in Galicia would be good. I'm happy to support you into Rumania this year.
I know he's opening North, I don't know if he's going to convoy to Norway or not. He said we'd talk about Belgium after we see how everyone opens, but that sounds like a lie to me.
He has not told me any of his plans, only asked me to not bounce him in Sweden.
I'll tell you if Germany has any bad ideas for you.
Yeah, I'm not sure what he plans
I'm in! Austria reached out to me about a DMZ in Galicia, so I'll probably take him up on that.
I'm planning on a bounce in Black Sea and sending Warsaw to Ukraine, so I'll still have a decent shot at Rumania.
Alright. We will keep in touch.
Maybe you could bounce Russia out of Sweden?
So what are you planning to do with your army?
Hello, good Germany! How are you feeling about Austria, Italy, and Russia?
I'm not sure yet. I think England and France may be working against me. Italy is making friendly gestures
I have agreed to let Russia into sweden for now, but we'll see what happens after spring.

Hi England,

Are you considering opening north? If so, I think you'd have my support.
Fair enough. Keep me in the loop if you'd like
Also, do you have any idea what England might be doing?
That's... concerning
What support would that be?
I think I may just keep it at home.

That’s interesting—I appreciate the transparency about your Black Sea bounce and Rumania ambitions. I’ll keep an eye on Austria’s moves in the Balkans and would be happy to coordinate indirectly if it helps you maintain a clear path. If you're aiming toward the Mediterranean or Balkans later this year, I’d welcome the chance to align our goals.
Thank you for the heads-up—I’ll keep an eye on Germany’s movements too, and if anything concerning arises, I’ll let you know. I’m still open to coordinating further if it suits both our strategies.

I appreciate your openness about Greece. If your army moves toward VEN or TRI this spring, I’d be happy to support your advance from the south. I’m also curious—will you be focusing on Greece or Romania this season?
Ok that's fair
Will do
No I don't, I think he may try to keep Russia out of Norway
I reckon it'd be beneficial for us to coordinate later on, but for now, we can definitely stay in touch.
Thanks, and I will as well.

Hello Italy!
I would just like to establish contact with you. I know that we don't really have anything to do with each other at this point but I would like to establish a working relationship as we continue this game.

I’ve noticed your fleet’s presence near the Bosporus. If you’re looking to expand into the Mediterranean this season, I’d be happy to coordinate in ION or APU to avoid conflict. I’m keen to ensure our paths align.
I’m monitoring your movements closely—I noticed your army in PAR is active. If you’re planning to push toward TUS or MAR, I’d appreciate a heads-up so we can avoid overlapping ambitions.

I’m keeping an eye on your movements near MUN and BER. If you’re considering a push toward the Italian border via TYR or PIE, I’d appreciate knowing ahead of time so we can manage our forces efficiently.
I'm not planning on that, and I'm moving to Burgundy.
I think that's a little strange. Why would you care about my army in Munich?

Hello England! It’s always wise to build working relationships early. I’m currently focused on securing my southern flank and monitoring movements in the central and eastern Mediterranean. If your interests ever drift toward the ION or Adriatic, I’d be happy to coordinate.
Burgundy is an interesting move—I assume it’s part of a broader push toward the Rhône or Switzerland? I remain open to coordination in TUS or ION if your path takes you that way.

Munich is a central hub, so it’s natural to wonder about your ambitions. I’m focused on maintaining stability along my northern border via TYR and VEN. If you’re not moving toward me this spring, I’ll keep my eye on your western strategy.

I appreciate your openness about Greece. If your army moves toward VEN or TRI this spring, I’d be happy to support your advance from the south. I’m also curious—will you be focusing on Greece or Romania this season?
Ok
I appreciate the support. I will keep you in mind.

I’ve noticed your fleet’s presence near the Bosporus. If you’re looking to expand into the Mediterranean this season, I’d be happy to coordinate in ION or APU to avoid conflict. I’m keen to ensure our paths align.
I just like to have a unit that can do something in case the worst happens.
Are you opening to Norwegian, North, and Edinburg?

Hello England! It’s always wise to build working relationships early. I’m currently focused on securing my southern flank and monitoring movements in the central and eastern Mediterranean. If your interests ever drift toward the ION or Adriatic, I’d be happy to coordinate.

I appreciate your brief response. If you’re not making aggressive moves toward the Italian border this spring, I’ll take it as a sign of good faith and continue to monitor the central front closely. If your plans shift later, I remain open to discussion.
I appreciate your support. If your fleet or army moves toward the ION or Adriatic regions later this year, I’d be happy to coordinate our positions to ensure mutual benefit.
Ok, I'm still not planning on moving to tyrolia
It’s wise to maintain flexibility—should your needs evolve toward the Italian border or Mediterranean this season, I’m open to coordinating in TUS or ION to avoid conflict.

That’s reassuring to hear. I’ll take it as a sign of stability along our borders and continue focusing on securing my southern flank. If your strategy shifts later in the season, I remain open to discussion.
Alright. We will keep in touch as things progress.
I plan on opening to Norwegian and North.
Have you heard anything from France?

I haven't heard anything definitive from France yet, but I've been keeping them in check regarding movements near the Mediterranean. If they do make a move toward TUS or ION, I'll be sure to relay it to you promptly.
Hello England! How are you doing?
I do plan to take Greece this year, as you well know. If you want to coordinate in the Ionian Sea, that'd be nice!
Any word from England?
Okay, great!
If you want to keep armies out of Piedmont, can you move there?

Hello Turkey!
Things are going alright. I haven't heard much from my neighbors except that I'm not to put an army on the continent any time soon.
How are things in the East?
Same with you.
Thanks.

Greece is indeed a shared interest—I’ll keep an eye on Austria’s movements toward it and ensure my forces don’t interfere with your plans. If your fleet moves toward ION or APU, let me know so we can avoid clashes and perhaps support each other.
If France does come at you I can try to lend you a hand.
Do you know if Germany is bouncing Russia out of Sweden?
Yes I understand that
I haven't heard much from Germany regarding Sweden.
Do you know what he's opening with?
Will do
Any word from Austria?
Fair enough! I'm doing well, for the most part. Russia seems a bit standoffish, and Austria seems wary of them. What about the West?
He said that you were trying to get Belgium but I don't know how true that is.
The West seems to be interesting at the moment. Everyone seems very cautious. I would be cautious about Austria.
How are things going with Italy?
How are things going with you and Turkey?
How are things going with you and Italy?
Have you heard anything from England about how he might open?
Interesting.
Well, it depends what you want to do.
Alright. Thanks for the info.
I'm not sure what to think of him. Have you heard anything about his intentions?
Serbia, I think.
I can't guarantee I'll be able to offer you Greece in the fall, but I can make sure you get your build in Tunis.
I wouldn't necessarily expect him to keep his word though.
I'm not sure if I'm going to move north at this point.
Alright. Good luck.
They're... interesting. I'm waiting to see how they're going to move this turn. You?
I haven't heard anything. I'm keeping my eye on them
Okay, thanks.
I will probably take Norway. We will see after that.
Seems reasonable
I'm not sure of their plans in the Mediterranean...
Yes.
Yes, but we don't want Russia to expand too quickly, we might need to help Germany if that happens.
Okay, that's good. I'm hoping to get Greece this year. That way we should be able to stand Russia out of Rumania and keep him out of the Balkans.
Fair enough. Do you mind if I take Bulgaria this turn?
Yeah, I wouldn't be upset if you took Bulgaria.
Alrighty
How're you feeling about Austria?
Pretty standard so far. How about you and France and Germany?
He asked me to DMZ Galicia, I haven't agreed to that.
I'm sending Moscow to Ukraine and then to Rumania.
Interesting. I haven't gotten anything that hints that he's going to do that
I'll keep an eye on him then.
Okay
I guess he lied to me. Did you know he was going to move to Tyrolia?
No, I didn't know. He must have guessed I would bounce him.
France and I have been getting along. Germany seems to be very conservative.
I was pretty happy with England. Austria and Italy are being a bit sketchy

I’d be happy to keep Piedmont clear for now—I’ll order my army in VEN to hold position or move elsewhere to avoid conflict. If you’re planning a broader push into the Italian region, I’d appreciate knowing your intentions.
Fair enough. How about Russia?
Austria's move into the Adriatic Sea is suspicious, if you'd like my opinion
Turkey has asked me to let him into Bulgaria so I can take Greece, but I don't trust him. He's also going to be able to stand you out of Rumania. How do you want to play this?
Yeah, and France opened pretty strongly against you. Do you want me to send an army north to help you out?
France wants me to ally with him against you, Germany asked me to bounce you in Norway, so there's a decent chance they're working together.
We can just try and bounce him there.
I'll support myself to Rumania and move to Black Sea again.
Has Turkey spoken to you about Greece?
Okay, but if you move to Piedmont, I'll build a fleet in Marseilles. I'm not going to attack you, it'd just waste resources.
Okay, sounds good.
Would you mind supporting me into Greece from Albania? That way we'll have a 2-2 stand-off there and I'll be able to help you get Rumania.
Thanks for moving to Den. Russia and Turkey seem to be at each other's throats which should help you take Swe.
I noticed your earlier offer to support Greece. If your army moves toward TRI or VEN this spring, I’d still be happy to support your flank from the south. I’m keen to ensure stability in the region.
What are you trying to do?
Any chance you know why Italy moved to Tyrolia?
Would you be open to bouncing in Galicia again?

Not yet, but I’ve been keeping Turkey’s attention focused on Greece, which might serve both our interests indirectly. If Turkey moves aggressively toward Salonika or Athens, I’d be happy to coordinate a response that channels their efforts away from your southern flank.

Understood. I’ll hold VEN for now, but I’ll keep an eye on your movements near Tuscany. If you’re focused elsewhere, I might consider a cautious advance—though I’ll make sure not to provoke any direct confrontation.
I'm afraid I can't do that

I’m positioning my fleet in the Ionian Sea to support your southern flank, in case Turkey or France grows more active in Greece. I’m also holding VEN to avoid conflict with France and could assist your ambitions in the Balkans if we align.
I think it was good that we bounced him out of sweden

I’ve positioned my fleet in the Ionian Sea with Greece in mind. If you’re considering Salonika or Athens, I’d be happy to support your efforts from the south—provided we align on long-term Mediterranean coordination. Let me know how you intend to proceed.
Sounds good, I hope we can keep our peace.
Yes. I can support you into Rumania.

I’ve been keeping my focus southward, but I’ve noticed your movements near the Rhine. If you intend to expand eastward or into the Italian region, I’d appreciate knowing your plans—so I can ensure our interests remain compatible.
Understandable
Sounds good. Austria is starting to trust me now, we're going to go after Turkey.
Yes, that sounds good.

I appreciate your assurance. I’ll continue to hold Venice firmly and remain neutral in your southern ambitions. Should your focus shift toward Tuscany, I’ll be happy to keep my army out of the way—though I’d appreciate knowing your timeline in advance.
Great!
Okay, no worries.
From Ukraine, right?
I have that entered in.
Austria is planning on taking Greece, and it'd help me out a lot if you were to move Ionian to Greece this turn to bounce them out of it.
It is, however, understandable that you're going to want Greece. Are you planning to take it with your fleet?
How do you feel about Germany's decision to take Belgium?
He said he didn't trust me and wanted to get his armies in position in case I tried something in Venice. I didn't really believe him.

That’s interesting—I hope your growing trust with Austria proves reliable. I’ll continue to channel Turkey’s attention toward Greece, which should help ease pressure on your southern flank. Let me know if you’d like more direct coordination on that front.
I would like to take it with my fleet. That way I can start moving towards Italy.
I appreciate the heads up, but I think it's pretty clear from my moves that I am moving west
Are you going to take Sweden this turn?
I didn't want to let you get a foothold in Europe so early, so I agreed to give him Belgium. I have no problems with you convoying to Belgium.

I’m glad to hear you’re on board. I’ll keep the fleet in the Ionian Sea ready to support your flank in Greece. If Turkey moves aggressively toward Salonika or Athens, I’ll act accordingly—provided we’re aligned.
Ok

I understand your concerns about Austria’s ambitions in Greece. My fleet in the Ionian Sea is already positioned to respond to emerging threats, and I am considering a move toward Greece to support your interests. However, I need clarity from you—do you intend to take Salonika or Athens this turn? If so, I’ll coordinate my fleet accordingly.
Of course.
Thanks for letting me know
Yes
No, I don't think I'll get Sweden.

I’ve heard from Turkey that they suspect you’re aiming for Greece. I remain committed to supporting your flank if we align, but I’d appreciate confirmation of your intentions in the region. If you’re moving toward Salonika or Athens, I’ll adjust my fleet’s position accordingly.

Of course—I appreciate your understanding. I’ll maintain a neutral stance near Tuscany and keep my army in Venice ready to adjust as needed. If your focus shifts further east, I’ll be sure to accommodate.
Thanks, I think I'll be good for now.
I will take Greece this turn
Yes, Ukraine to Rumania.
Would you be open to keeping Venice and Trieste where they are?

I’ve received your recent updates regarding Salonika and Greece. I’ll consider a fleet movement toward Greece to support your ambitions, provided we clarify your intended focus—Salonika or Athens. Let me know your plans so I can coordinate accordingly.
Are you going to move North Sea to Belgium?
Alright. Thank you.
I will take Greece this turn. I hope we can still work together in future. I appreciate your understanding.

I’ve noticed Turkey’s growing interest in Salonika and Greece. I remain open to supporting your flank in the Balkans if you’re prepared to act decisively. If you’re positioning toward TRI or VEN, I’ll adjust my strategy to assist.
I was planning on it. Do you have any objections?
Nope, I was just wondering if I should bounce France in Belgium

I appreciate your confirmation. Given your intention to take Greece this turn, I’ll position my fleet toward Salonika or Athens to support your efforts. Let me know whether you plan to focus on Salonika or Athens—I’ll adjust accordingly to avoid conflict and ensure we align.
Of course—I’m happy to keep Venice and Trieste stable for now. I’m also monitoring Turkey’s moves toward Greece and will keep them distracted where possible to ease pressure on your southern flank.
Got it
I know you said you were against Russia, but what are your thoughts on Austria?
Thanks for understanding.
Ok.
Thanks!

Got it. I appreciate your confirmation. I’ll prepare my fleet in the Ionian Sea for a move toward Salonika or Athens to support your ambitions. Please clarify your intended focus—Salonika or Athens—so I can align my movement accordingly.

I’ve noticed Turkey’s confirmation of their focus on Greece. If you’re still interested in securing the Balkans, I’d be happy to adjust my fleet’s position to support your flank—particularly if you’re considering TRI or VEN as part of your strategy.
I think that's a possibility, what are you thinking for this turn?
I'm wary of them, for sure.
Ok, they seem to be going for Russia so that should help you out a little

I’ve been monitoring Turkey’s movements toward Greece and remain ready to support your flank if we align. If you’re positioning toward TRI or VEN this fall, I’ll adjust my army’s stance to assist. Let me know how you intend to proceed.

I’ve positioned my fleet in the Ionian Sea with Greece in mind. I’m ready to support your ambitions toward Salonika or Athens, provided we coordinate our efforts. Could you confirm your primary target so I can align my movement accordingly?
That would probably be best.
Oh, I see
Have you heard anything about Germany moving to Burgundy?
I'm going to go after Greece
I was hoping you'd move to Holland, but now I'm not sure. What are you thinking?

I’ll continue holding Venice firmly and remain neutral in your southern ambitions. Should your focus shift toward Tuscany, I’ll ensure my army doesn’t interfere—though I’d appreciate knowing your plans ahead of time.

I’m keeping Turkey’s attention focused on Greece, which should ease pressure on your southern flank. If you’d like more direct coordination on that front, I’m happy to adjust my fleet’s position accordingly.

I appreciate your confirmation. Given your intention to target Greece, I’ll position my fleet toward Salonika or Athens to support your ambitions. Could you clarify whether your primary focus is Salonika or Athens this turn? That way I can align my movement accordingly and ensure we avoid any friction.
No, sorry.
I'd like to bounce England in Belgium if that's ok
Okay, got it.
Haha, I love how you used past tense for both of them.
Ok sounds good
I would appreciate that.
Alright, that's fine.
What are you doing in the north?

How are things in the west? Are you working with England?
I'm bouncing England in Norway, and I might get Sweden.

My apologies for the ambiguity—I meant to clarify that I will continue to hold Venice and remain open to adjusting my stance if your focus shifts toward Tuscany. I’m keen to avoid any unintended friction.

Yep!
